calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Off Calendar

Defendant Michael Bowen'S Motion For The Genuiness Of All Documents And The Truth Of All Matters Specified In Bowen'S Requests For Admissions To Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on WED-JUN-19-2013: Aaron M. Cargain, Esq. of Van De Poel, Levy & Allen LLP appearing for MICHAEL TIMOTHY BOWEN, defendant / moving party; No other appearance.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Defendant MICHAEL BOWEN'S Motion for the Genuiness of All Documents and The Truth of All Matters Specified in Bowen's Requests for Admissions to be Deemed Admitted. The Court finds the motion to deem admitted the matters at issue in the RFA's is denied given that responses have now been served and extenuating circumstances existed as the result of Plaintiff's lawyer withdrawing from the case in April. The Court does find that both Plaintiff, and his prior counsel, are responsible for Defendant having to file this motion, and therefore, awards sanctions in the amount of $300. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ptlf To Respond To Deft'S Discovery Demands, For The Genuiness Of All Documents And The Truth Of All Matters Specified In Bowen'S Requests For Admissions To Be Deemed Admitted, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dana Sack, Esq. of Sack Rosendin, LLP (510.286.2200) appearing for MOHAMMED RIBHI AYESH, plaintiff / opposing party
Jennifer R. Thomas, Esq. of Van de Poel, Levy & Allen, LLP (925.934.6102) appearing for MICHAEL TIMOTHY BOWEN, defendant / moving party

RULING - A R G U E D: Defendant MICHAEL BOWEN'S Motion to Compel Plaintiff to Respond to Defendant's Discovery Demands, for the Genuiness of All Documents and The Truth of All Matters Specified in Bowen's Requests for Admissions to be Deemed Admitted, and for Monetary Sanctions is Granted in part. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kirk Anderson, Esq. (415-785-3762) for Mohammed Ribhi Ayesh, plaintiff and moving party/ Mohammed Ribhi Ayesh, plaintiff / No appearance by defendant

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S MOHAMMED AYESH's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
